requirements.summary: Restore all frontend files to their exact Version 5 state, including authentication gating, routes, pages, components, hooks, context, and stylesheets
acceptanceCriteria: All frontend pages render correctly as they did in Version 5.
Authentication gating (AuthGuard) is restored if it existed in Version 5.
useQueries.ts uses the authenticated actor as it did in Version 5.
Dashboard, CreateInvitationWizard, InvitationEditor, and all other pages function identically to Version 5.
No login/auth removal changes from versions after Version 5 are present.
All routes, layouts, and components match Version 5 exactly.

file_operations.description: Restore App.tsx to Version 5 state, including any AuthGuard wrappers on protected routes, the original route configuration for landing, dashboard, create, edit, invitation, and 404 pages, and any providers that existed in Version 5.
Restore AuthGuard.tsx to Version 5 state, re-implementing authentication gating logic that protects admin/user routes by checking identity and redirecting unauthenticated users.
Restore LandingPage.tsx to Version 5 state, ensuring the marketing hero section, feature highlights, and navigation match the original design and behavior.
Restore Dashboard.tsx to Version 5 state, including the invitation list UI, publish/delete/copy actions, RSVP responses modal integration, and any authentication-dependent rendering logic.
Restore CreateInvitationWizard.tsx to Version 5 state, ensuring the multi-step wizard flow (couple details, events, template, media, review) matches the original progression and submission logic.
Restore InvitationEditor.tsx to Version 5 state, including the tabbed editor interface for updating invitation details, photos, and events with data fetching and mutation hooks as they existed.

Restore GuestInvitation.tsx to Version 5 state, ensuring the public-facing invitation page renders correctly with all themed sections (hero, couple intro, events, photo gallery, RSVP form, venue) and handles loading/error/unpublished states.
Restore NotFound.tsx to Version 5 state with the original 404 error page layout and navigation buttons.
Restore Header.tsx to Version 5 state, including the responsive navigation bar with scroll transitions, mobile menu, and any authentication-dependent UI elements (login button, user menu).
Restore DecorativeDivider.tsx to Version 5 state with its original three variants (mandala, line, flourish) and SVG fallback logic.
Restore CoupleDetailsStep.tsx to Version 5 state, ensuring the form fields, validation, and photo upload functionality match the original implementation.
Restore EventManagementStep.tsx to Version 5 state, including the event CRUD UI, card display, and navigation buttons as they existed.
Restore TemplateThemeStep.tsx to Version 5 state, including template selection, color scheme picker, font selector, background style chooser, and theme variant save/apply functionality.
Restore MediaManagementStep.tsx to Version 5 state with photo gallery upload and music uploader sections as they existed.
Restore ReviewStep.tsx to Version 5 state, including the summary view of couple details, events, template/theme, media, and URL slug collection before submission.
Restore ProgressBar.tsx to Version 5 state with the original multi-step progress indicator styling and animation.
Restore TemplateSelector.tsx to Version 5 state, ensuring the template grid display and selection logic match the original implementation.
Restore TemplatePreview.tsx to Version 5 state, including the live preview card rendering with theme resolution for colors, fonts, and backgrounds.
Restore ColorSchemePicker.tsx to Version 5 state with the original color scheme grid and selection behavior.
Restore FontSelector.tsx to Version 5 state, including the FONT_CHOICES list and font pairing selector UI.
Restore HeroSection.tsx to Version 5 state with the full-screen hero layout showing couple photos, names, wedding date, and venue over the parallax background.
Restore CoupleIntroduction.tsx to Version 5 state with the couple photos and names section, theme support, and scroll animation.
Restore EventTimeline.tsx to Version 5 state, including the event cards with type-specific styling, icons, gradients, and scroll animations.
Restore PhotoGalleryLightbox.tsx to Version 5 state with the responsive gallery grid and fullscreen lightbox navigation.
Restore RSVPForm.tsx to Version 5 state, including the guest RSVP form fields, theme styling, submission logic, and confirmation screen.
Restore VenueSection.tsx to Version 5 state with the venue card display, scroll animation, and Google Maps link.
Restore CountdownTimer.tsx to Version 5 state with the live countdown timer display and template-based styling.
Restore WhatsAppShareButton.tsx to Version 5 state with the fixed floating share button and pre-filled link generation.
Restore EventCard.tsx to Version 5 state, including the event type-specific styling, date/time/venue display, and edit/delete action buttons.
Restore EventForm.tsx to Version 5 state with the create/edit form for events, including event type selector and all input fields.
Restore PhotoGalleryUpload.tsx to Version 5 state, including the drag-and-drop upload interface, preview grid, and data URL storage.
Restore MusicUploader.tsx to Version 5 state with the audio file upload, preview/play functionality, and auto-play toggle.
Restore MusicController.tsx to Version 5 state, including the floating audio player widget with play/pause, mute, and volume controls.
Restore RSVPResponsesModal.tsx to Version 5 state, displaying RSVP responses list and summary stats using the original data fetching hooks.
Restore SkeletonLoader.tsx to Version 5 state with all four skeleton variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) and shimmer animation.

Restore useQueries.ts to Version 5 state, ensuring all React Query hooks use the authenticated actor as they did originally, reverting any anonymous actor changes or login-gating removals introduced after Version 5.
Restore InvitationFormContext.tsx to Version 5 state, including the original form state shape, CRUD helpers for events, and any authentication-dependent logic.
Restore templateDefinitions.ts to Version 5 state, ensuring the TEMPLATES array contains the exact styling metadata (colors, fonts, gradients) for all invitation templates as they existed.
Restore eventIcons.tsx to Version 5 state with the original EventType-to-config mapping for icons, colors, and gradients.
Restore animations.ts to Version 5 state, including all animation constants, easing curves, Framer Motion presets, and helper functions.
Restore urlParams.ts to Version 5 state with the original URL parameter reading, storing, and clearing utilities.
Restore index.css to Version 5 state, ensuring Google Fonts imports, Tailwind directives, and CSS custom properties for color palettes (gold, crimson, ivory, charcoal) match the original.
Restore tailwind.config.js to Version 5 state, including the original wedding luxury theme with custom color palettes, typography, shadows, and dark mode configuration.
Restore frontend/index.css to Version 5 state with the original global Tailwind CSS entry point and CSS custom properties for theme tokens.
